title: The University of Manchester Online LearningOnline and Blended Learning at The University of Manchester gives flexible access to a leading education wherever you are in the world. With full and part-time postgraduate qualifications ranging from CPD to master’s in areas from analytical chemistry to sustainable engineering, online and blended study with Manchester gives you the opportunity to upskill and learn at your own pace and at your own level. Designed with working professionals in mind, our range of courses will give you the edge in your career by learning from a world-renowned teaching and research institution.View department

title:
Birmingham OnlineThis is your time – Become a leader in your field with a 100% online postgraduate degree from the University of Birmingham.

One of the UK’s top academic institutions, our programmes are career-centred, internationally focused and expertly taught. Recognised as a world 'top-100' institution (QS World University Rankings 2025) and prestigious Russell Group member, the University of Birmingham has been challenging and developing leading minds for more than a century - a tradition that continues today, no matter where or how you study.

The University of Birmingham has the strength and variety of programmes to suit your individual needs and interests, backed by the academic expertise and influence, support and facilities of a top 100 public research and teaching university. You’ll benefit from both academic and personal development to achieve success and ensure your degree is an asset in your future prospects.View department

title: Faculty of Natural, Mathematical & Engineering SciencesWe are a vibrant faculty based in the heart of London with a long tradition of world-leading research and teaching in physics, mathematics, chemistry, computer science, and engineering. Our internationally-renowned scientists work across traditional subject boundaries, leading cutting-edge research, tackling global challenges, and answering fundamental questions about our world and universe. Our vision is to advance academic excellence, innovation, and impact in natural, mathematical, and engineering sciences to benefit our students, staff, and society. Interdisciplinary collaboration is at the core of our academic activities, enhancing student learning and accelerating discovery and innovation.View department

title:
HKU Business SchoolTracing its roots back over a century, the University of Hong Kong (HKU) today proudly stands as one of the leading institutions of higher education in Asia. And with it, the HKU Business School has grown to become a widely recognised and respected business school in the region. 
The HKU Business School strives to nurture first-class business leaders and to foster both academic and applied research to serve the needs of Hong Kong, China and the rest of the world in the fast-changing global economy. We engage leading scholars from all corners of the world who instil students with global knowledge.View department

title: School of Physics and AstronomyThe School of Physics and Astronomy at the University of Edinburgh is renowned for its excellence for the quality, scale and breadth of its research. Located in one of the UK’s leading physics and astronomy department, The School of Physics and Astronomy offers world-class education. With a rich history of discovery, including the Higgs boson, students are provided with extraordinary academic and career potential. Recent graduates have undertaken exciting careers across a range of industries and research, helping shape the future of physics and astronomy. Depending on what programme you choose, you’ll have the chance to answer fundamental and exciting questions about living matter and the science of life. You will gain advanced experimental and computational techniques, and theoretical understanding. You will be taught by leading academics with a genuine passion for their subject, and benefit from our commitment to continuously refine our teaching approaches to achieve the best educational outcome.View department

title: University of London WorldwideThe University of London is the UK’s leading provider of online learning internationally, offering programmes to around 40,000 students across the world. We are a pioneer in distance and flexible learning, empowering students in over 190 countries to earn a prestigious degree from the University of London, from wherever they are in the world. We are a federation of 17 prestigious member institutions, including King’s College London, LSE, and UCL, offering our students access to world-class teaching, research, and a global academic community.View department

title: Paris CampusSchiller International University offers a unique global education experience through its four campuses—Tampa, Heidelberg, Paris, and Madrid. These campuses provide students with the opportunity to study in diverse cultural, economic, and professional landscapes, enriching their academic and personal growth. With a student body representing over 130 nationalities, Schiller fosters an immersive, multicultural environment that enhances cross-cultural communication, adaptability, and global networking.View department

title:
Deusto Business SchoolDeusto Business School is accredited by the Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business 
(AACSB) and by the Association of MBAs (AMBA). These international accreditations recognize quality and excellence in business education and place Deusto Business School among the forefront of its peers. Only 2% and 6% of business schools worldwide are recognized by AMBA and by AACSB, respectively. 
Deusto Business School is the only Business School in Spain that has been around for over a century. It has pioneered the training of business leaders at its two locations: Bilbao and San Sebastian. 
Deusto Business School is distinct in its coherence with centuries-old tradition and prestige while 
simultaneously embracing the major trends that are currently transforming the world of business.View department

title:
UCD College of ScienceUniversity College Dublin (UCD) is one of the top universities in Europe and is also ranked in the top 1% of higher education institutions worldwide. 
The UCD College of Science offers world-class taught masters courses to equip you with the knowledge and skills to excel in diverse scientific fields including biotechnology, sustainability, earth sciences, chemistry, data science, artificial intelligence and physics. 
Our faculty are expert teachers and world-class researchers. Their research strengths and interests directly inform the content and quality of our courses.
The UCD College of Science masters degrees provide an excellent foundation for a wide variety of careers and our graduates are in high demand for science and science-related roles in Ireland and abroad.View department

title: Institute of Psychiatry, Psychology and NeuroscienceThe Institute of Psychiatry, Psychology & Neuroscience is a world leader in its field. Our mission is to understand, prevent and treat mental health illness and diseases of the brain, and to train the next generation of practitioners and researchers. Home to one of the world’s largest centres for neuroscience research, and based on the same site as the world famous Maudsley Hospital, our students get the opportunity to work alongside world-leading scientists and clinicians.View department

title: Faculty of Mathematical and Physical SciencesMake your Master’s matter with our postgraduate degrees at the UCL Faculty of Mathematical and Physical Sciences. The faculty has world-leading expertise across a wide breadth of disciplines encompassing the logical, experimental and mathematical study of our Universe; we offer a range of programmes in emerging as well as more traditional academic areas. You'll benefit from front-line research that feeds directly into our taught graduate programmes and access to first-class facilities within the faculty.View department

title: School of MathematicsWe are one of the world’s leading mathematical sciences departments, with an innovative educational environment and a vibrant academic community. We are home to internationally excellent researchers and are proud of the breadth and depth of our mathematical research. Quantitative skills have never been more in demand, and with close links to industry and weekly employability events, our graduates leave with all the attributes they need to take the next step.View department

title: Goldsmiths, University of London OnlineGoldsmiths, University of London (Online) offers a bold and distinctive learning experience, bringing world-class, career-connected education in technology and the social sciences to a flexible, fully online format. With over 120 years of academic excellence, Goldsmiths inspires students to think differently, challenge convention, and create meaningful change. Supported by the expert GOAL (Goldsmiths Online and Adaptable Learning) team, programmes are dynamic, interactive, and collaborative, combining personalised feedback with dedicated student support to help learners thrive from anywhere in the world.View department

title: MLA CollegeBased in the UK, MLA College is a global leader in higher education, offering specialised programmes in marine, maritime, sustainability, engineering and business. As experts in these fields, MLA College delivers flexible, distance-learning degrees designed for working professionals. The programmes combine academic excellence with real-world relevance, equipping students with modern knowledge in sustainability, leadership and innovation, empowering them to thrive in a dynamic and global industry.View department

title: Faculty of ScienceThe Faculty of Science at University of Southern Denmark is a leading centre for scientific research and education that tackles some of the most pressing scientific questions and global challenges. Researchers at the Faculty of Science conduct research on water and the environment, the origins and physics of the Universe, first life on earth, operator algebra, efficient algorithms, synthetic biology, future pharmaceuticals, and of course proteomics, where SDU is second to none.View department

title: Department of OncologyThe Department of Oncology is a leading centre for cancer research and education, dedicated to advancing both basic and clinical oncology, with a strong emphasis on translating scientific discoveries into improved patient outcomes. Our department blends multidisciplinary research, state-of-the-art infrastructure and close partnerships with clinicians to drive real impact in the prevention, diagnosis and treatment of cancer. Research focuses on key themes including the tumour microenvironment, DNA damage and repair, and tumour immunology. The Department of Oncology has a vibrant postgraduate student community who benefit from world-class teaching, close mentorship from leading experts, and the opportunity to work on projects with direct clinical relevance.View department

title: Faculty of Life Sciences & MedicineThe Faculty of Life Sciences & Medicine is one of the largest and most successful centres for research and education in the UK, with extensive global partnerships. With world-renowned researchers and a passionate student body, we are always encouraging innovative and progressive collaboration, as well as new ways to work and learn.View department

title: Faculty of Humanities and Social SciencesThe Faculty of Humanities & Social Sciences, the largest faculty at the University of Bath, is home to six departments. We span a wide range of social science specialisms, such as economics, international education, sport management, international relations, interpreting and translation, forensic psychology, and international development. Our approach to teaching and professional development is designed to leave you well-equipped to kickstart or change careers. Many of our courses offer placements or consultancy projects to give you hands-on experience as part of your degree. Our teaching excellence and real-world experience encourage wider thinking, and help you realise your potential to make a positive impact on society.View department

title: The School of Physical and Mathematical SciencesThe School of Physical and Mathematical Sciences (SPMS) at Nanyang Technological University, Singapore, is a global leader in advancing knowledge across physics, mathematics, with a strong focus on innovation and real-world applications. Our postgraduate programmes, including the MSc in Financial Technology, MSc in Analytics, MSc in Modelling and Simulation, and MSc in Precision Scientific Instrumentation, equip graduates with both theoretical mastery and practical expertise. SPMS offers a dynamic learning environment where academic rigour meets hands-on experience, supported by world-class faculty, cutting-edge facilities, and strong industry partnerships. We prepare students to become future-ready scientists, data innovators, and technology leaders who drive impactful transformation across research and industry.View department

title: SRH Campus MunichWe are SRH University, a private university network in Germany. Our mission: education that empowers, supports, and inspires people to shape their future. We value individuality and foster both academic and personal growth. At SRH, you study under the innovative CORE principle—focusing on one to two modules over five weeks. This allows for deeper understanding, practical learning through projects, and teamwork. Our lecturers are learning coaches who provide individual support and feedback. Exams include real-world formats beyond traditional tests.View department

title: School of Biological SciencesThe School of Biological Sciences at the University of Edinburgh is based at the King’s Buildings campus, located in the south of Scotland’s capital city and approximately two miles from the centre of Edinburgh. We are one of the largest biology departments in the United Kingdom, and our staff and students contribute to a vibrant academic community, each with a shared vision to shape tomorrow’s world. We offer twelve on-campus masters programmes spanning the breadth of the Biological Sciences. Our postgraduate teaching derives from our research strengths, and you will learn from scientists of international repute. Through our world-leading research, teaching, innovation and impact, we strive to solve real-world problems of local, national and international relevance. By studying with us you will be in an exceptional position to help make the future better for generations to come.View department

title:
School of ManagementIndustries worldwide are continually impacted and disrupted by global events, digital transformation, and advancing technologies which are changing the global business landscape. Organisations want exciting new leaders to emerge and change the future of business and studying a business or management programme can help you achieve this. A business or management degree exposes you to multiple disciplines to develop an adaptable and versatile skillset which you can apply to an array of industries. 

Our programmes are designed to equip you with the skills and knowledge to use data to make strategic decisions, manage resources effectively, achieve organisational goals, and become critical thinkers and innovators. 

At UCL School of Management, we focus on creating disruptive research and preparing the next generation of creative and influential leaders who can apply the latest technological developments as a strategic asset for businesses in the complex, interconnected world of the future.View department

title: Faculty of Population Health SciencesJoin the UCL Faculty of Population Health Sciences and take on the world’s most urgent health challenges. Study alongside leading researchers and apply cutting-edge methods – from clinical trials and data science to social sciences and omics – to improve lives. Our Master’s degrees span public health, global health, women’s and child health, cardiovascular science, clinical trials, and the business of health, giving you insight into how innovation shapes systems like the NHS. Your Master’s equips you to lead change, influence decision-making, and drive impact across sectors. At UCL, you’ll gain the skills, networks, and global perspective to shape a healthier future. Make your Master’s matter.View department

title:
Business SchoolFounded in 1495, the University of Aberdeen is Scotland’s third oldest university and the fifth oldest university in the UK, with a rich heritage and a global reputation for academic excellence. University of Aberdeen is home to over 14,000 students  from 130 different nationalities, and is consistently ranked among the world’s leading institutions. 
Ranked 8th in the UK for Business and Management Studies in the Guardian University Guide 2025. Ranked 15th in the UK for Business, Management and Marketing in the Times and Sunday Times Good University Guide 2025 . Ranked 4th in the UK for Accounting and Finance in the Guardian University Guide 2025. Ranked 13th in the UK for Economics in the Guardian University Guide 2025.The University of Aberdeen has been ranked 3rd in the UK, 4th in Europe and 19th in the world for its real estate research (EduRank 2024).View department

Business SchoolFounded in 1495, the University of Aberdeen is Scotland’s third oldest university and the fifth oldest university in the UK, with a rich heritage and a global reputation for academic excellence. University of Aberdeen is home to over 14,000 students  from 130 different nationalities, and is consistently ranked among the world’s leading institutions. 
Ranked 8th in the UK for Business and Management Studies in the Guardian University Guide 2025. Ranked 15th in the UK for Business, Management and Marketing in the Times and Sunday Times Good University Guide 2025 . Ranked 4th in the UK for Accounting and Finance in the Guardian University Guide 2025. Ranked 13th in the UK for Economics in the Guardian University Guide 2025.The University of Aberdeen has been ranked 3rd in the UK, 4th in Europe and 19th in the world for its real estate research (EduRank 2024).View department

title: Heidelberg CampusSchiller International University offers a unique global education experience through its four campuses—Tampa, Heidelberg, Paris, and Madrid. These campuses provide students with the opportunity to study in diverse cultural, economic, and professional landscapes, enriching their academic and personal growth. With a student body representing over 130 nationalities, Schiller fosters an immersive, multicultural environment that enhances cross-cultural communication, adaptability, and global networking.View department

title:
Faculty of Social and Historical SciencesShape the future with UCL Social and Historical Sciences. We offer over 60 specialist postgraduate programmes across a diverse range of subjects. Our interests span the globe, as we seek to understand the social, political, economic, cultural and environmental processes that have shaped the world over time. 

Our academics are at the forefront of innovative, interdisciplinary research and education that creates a meaningful, real-world impact. We’ll challenge you to think critically, engage with global challenges, and seek creative solutions. 

Renowned for our excellence in teaching and research, we foster a vibrant culture of innovation. From tackling climate change to addressing economic inequality, our academics, alumni, and students are dedicated to exploring new ways to address pressing global issues.View department

title: Faculty of Life SciencesUCL’s Faculty of Life Sciences is a world-leading community of researchers, educators and innovators, tackling the biggest challenges in human health and the living world - from cancer and infectious disease to biodiversity, neuroscience and drug discovery. Our postgraduate programmes are delivered across three exceptional schools: Biosciences, Pharmacy and Psychological Sciences, combining cutting-edge science with real-world impact. You will study in the heart of London, supported by outstanding facilities, expert supervision and strong links with clinical, industry and global research partners. Join a diverse and collaborative environment where curiosity, rigour and creativity drive discovery - and where students graduate prepared to shape the future of science, healthcare and society.View department

title:
Kent Business SchoolAt  Kent Business School (KBS), ambition drives everything we do. Whether you're looking to enhance your expertise, pivot your career, or join a dynamic global business community, our forward-thinking postgraduate programmes are designed to set you up for success in today’s fast-changing world.
Located at the heart of a top 50 UK university, and housed in the award-winning Sibson Building on our Canterbury campus, or our commuter-friendly Medway campus, Kent Business School delivers a world-class experience – academically, professionally, and personally.View department

title:
Columbian College of Arts and SciencesGW’s Columbian College is a magnet for top scholars and a catalyst for learning and discovery. With more than 90 doctoral and master’s programs, we offer a transformative experience, connecting students with some of the most influential leaders and institutions while partnering with public and private organizations in the nation’s capital and around the globe.
Hone your expertise in subjects as diverse as statistics, fine arts, public policy, art therapy, forensic sciences, and LGBT health policy and practice.View department

title: Faculty of Social SciencesThe Faculty of Social Sciences is the second youngest faculty of Charles University. It was established in 1990 and is based in Prague, Czech Republic. The faculty offers BA, MA and PhD programs in all areas of social sciences: communication studies and journalism, economic, international, political and sociological studies.View department

title: Faculty of Engineering SciencesWelcome to the UCL Faculty of Engineering Sciences! Studying a postgraduate degree with us means getting the skills needed to change the world. We’re acknowledged as a world-leading institution and you’ll benefit from our excellence in teaching and research, our outstanding facilities in the heart of London and the superior career prospects we offer our students. We offer a huge range of programmes and courses across the spectrum of engineering disciplines – including mechanical, healthcare, electric, chemical, biochemical, civil, structural and environmental. We also incorporate teaching beyond traditional engineering, including management, crime science, computer science, and engineering and public policy. We are a uniquely multidisciplinary faculty, and this drives our innovation, our progressive pedagogical approach, and our commitment to solving the world’s toughest challenges.View department

title:
Leeds OnlineStudy online with the University of Leeds and you’ll gain a degree from a Russell Group university, renowned globally for the quality of our research and teaching. 

You’ll be taught by subject experts in a stimulating and collaborative environment, with accessible digital resources to enhance your experience. You’ll also have access to our full range of student services and expert support, from the first day of your course until graduation and beyond. 

Our online courses are accessible from anywhere in the world, for study when it suits you. Plan your studies around your job, family life or other commitments, and take breaks between modules if you need to.View department

title: Engineering, Environment and Emerging TechnologiesTrinity College Dublin is Ireland's leading university, renowned for its academic excellence and rich history. Through the E3 initiative - The School of Computer Science & Statistics, School of Engineering, and School of Natural Sciences - we offer a dynamic and multidisciplinary learning environment at the forefront of innovation. We provide students with world-class research opportunities, industry-relevant skills, and a vibrant campus community in the heart of Dublin, preparing them to be global leaders in their fields. Find our more about our university and undergraduate and postgraduate programmes from our three schools of Computer Science & Statistics, Engineering, and Natural Sciences.View department

title: Applied PhysicsApplied PhysicsApplied Physics at CERN plays a vital role in transforming theoretical concepts into tangible technologies that drive both scientific discovery and practical innovation. From developing cutting-edge particle detectors to contributing to global medical advancements, CERN's applied physicists are at the forefront of technology that changes the world.Explore this career
description: Applied PhysicsApplied PhysicsApplied Physics at CERN plays a vital role in transforming theoretical concepts into tangible technologies that drive both scientific discovery and practical innovation. From developing cutting-edge particle detectors to contributing to global medical advancements, CERN's applied physicists are at the forefront of technology that changes the world.Explore this career

title: Data Science & Data AnalyticsData Science & Data AnalyticsOur Data Analytics and Data Science experts transform massive datasets from large physics experiments into valuable insights leveraging cutting-edge algorithms and computational tools to drive innovation across various fields.Explore this career

title: Experimental PhysicsExperimental PhysicsCERN’s Experimental Physics challenges the limits of our understanding, transforming bold theories into high-energy collisions that reveal the universe’s deepest secrets. From designing experiments to analysing breakthrough data, our physicists push the boundaries of knowledge every day. Ready to turn theory into discovery?Explore this career
description: Experimental PhysicsExperimental PhysicsCERN’s Experimental Physics challenges the limits of our understanding, transforming bold theories into high-energy collisions that reveal the universe’s deepest secrets. title: International RelationsInternational RelationsInternational Relations drive the Organization's strategy to build and maintain robust political, financial, and public support for CERN's scientific and societal missions.Explore this career

title: Material and Surface ScienceMaterial and Surface ScienceDeveloping and maintaining advanced materials and surfaces essential for the optimal performance of particle accelerators.Explore this career
description: Material and Surface ScienceMaterial and Surface ScienceDeveloping and maintaining advanced materials and surfaces essential for the optimal performance of particle accelerators.Explore this career

title: MathematicsMathematicsMathematics at CERN provides the essential language and tools that underpin theoretical models, data analysis, and algorithm development. From simulating high-energy collisions to optimizing detector performance, mathematical methods drive innovation across all areas of particle physics research.Explore this career
description: MathematicsMathematicsMathematics at CERN provides the essential language and tools that underpin theoretical models, data analysis, and algorithm development. From simulating high-energy collisions to optimizing detector performance, mathematical methods drive innovation across all areas of particle physics research.Explore this career

title: Mechanical EngineeringMechanical EngineeringMechanical Engineering at CERN is crucial to advancing technology and enabling cutting-edge scientific discoveries. Our engineers design, build, and maintain sophisticated machinery, complex accelerator systems and experimental facilities that power some of the world’s most complex and impactful experiments.Explore this career
description: Mechanical EngineeringMechanical EngineeringMechanical Engineering at CERN is crucial to advancing technology and enabling cutting-edge scientific discoveries. Our engineers design, build, and maintain sophisticated machinery, complex accelerator systems and experimental facilities that power some of the world’s most complex and impactful experiments.Explore this career

title: Software Engineering and ITSoftware Engineering and ITSoftware is crucial to CERN's mission of producing particle beams for physics experiments, coordinating thousands of devices through a sophisticated accelerator control system. Our engineers and technicians develop software across all layers, from embedded real-time systems to micro-service-based backend servers and user interfaces. We leverage mainstream, open-source technologies such as Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, Java, Python, and Kafka, ensuring our knowledge is broadly applicable beyond CERN.Explore this career
description: Software Engineering and ITSoftware Engineering and ITSoftware is crucial to CERN's mission of producing particle beams for physics experiments, coordinating thousands of devices through a sophisticated accelerator control system. Our engineers and technicians develop software across all layers, from embedded real-time systems to micro-service-based backend servers and user interfaces. We leverage mainstream, open-source technologies such as Linux, Docker, Kubernetes, Java, Python, and Kafka, ensuring our knowledge is broadly applicable beyond CERN.Explore this career

title: Support Services (Finance, HR, Legal, Procurement)Support Services (Finance, HR, Legal, Procurement)Support Services at CERN ensure smooth operations across the Organization, from finance, logistics and legal expertise to human resources, administrative support and scientific information management, enabling our scientists to focus on groundbreaking research.Explore this career
description: Support Services (Finance, HR, Legal, Procurement)Support Services (Finance, HR, Legal, Procurement)Support Services at CERN ensure smooth operations across the Organization, from finance, logistics and legal expertise to human resources, administrative support and scientific information management, enabling our scientists to focus on groundbreaking research.Explore this career

title: Theoretical PhysicsTheoretical PhysicsTheoretical physics at CERN explores the fundamental principles of particles and forces, providing the framework for understanding the universe at its most fundamental level. It transforms abstract concepts into testable predictions, ensuring that CERN remains at the cutting edge of discovery.Explore this career
